Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Deconstruct the Request Goal Create a Python dictionary representing a Temporal Profile for a global supply chain process Process Activities SS OP RC QI CA PT PK WS DT AS Structure Keys are tuples of activity pairs where Act1 precedes Act2 Values are tuples average time standard deviation in seconds Constraints Include pairs that eventually follow each other not just direct successors Estimate times based on domain knowledge Include a representative subset ensuring complexity Output format Python dictionary

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Estimate Times Domain Knowledge Simulation Context High tech electronics manufacturing global supply chain Units Seconds 1 hour 3600s 1 day 86400s 1 week 604800s 1 month 2592000s

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Activity Flow and Durations SS to OP Selection to Order Usually fast internal process Maybe 1 to 3 days Avg 2 days Std 12 hours OP to RC Order to Receive Global shipping manufacturing lead time High tech components can take weeks Avg 3 weeks Std 1 week RC to QI Receive to Inspection Should be quick to avoid backlog Avg 4 hours Std 2 hours QI to CA Inspection to Assembly If passed moves to line Avg 8 hours Std 4 hours CA to PT Assembly to Testing Immediate or batched Avg 2 hours Std 1 hour PT to PK Testing to Packaging If passed pack Avg 1 hour Std 30 mins PK to WS Packaging to Storage Quick Avg 30 mins Std 15 mins WS to DT Storage to Distribution Depends on demand shipping schedule Avg 2 days Std 1 day DT to AS Distribution to Support Support happens after sale Could be days to months Avg 30 days Std 30 days

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Calculate Pairs Direct and Indirect Direct SS OP OP RC RC QI QI CA CA PT PT PK PK WS WS DT DT AS

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Indirect Cumulative Estimates Note When calculating indirect pairs the average is the sum of averages The standard deviation is the square root of the sum of variances assuming independence For a Temporal Profile estimation summing variances is the standard statistical approach Formula Avg total Sum Avg i Std total sqrt Sum Std i squared

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Review and Refine Output Check keys Tuples of strings Check values Tuples of numbers Check variety Includes direct short indirect long indirect full chain Check realism SS OP reasonable OP RC reasonable RC QI reasonable QI CA reasonable CA PT reasonable PT PK reasonable PK WS reasonable WS DT reasonable DT AS reasonable Variances and calculations checked

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: Added for variety Lets calc Wait let me double check SS WS calculation in thought SS WS includes OP RC So Std should be dominated by OP RC Avg 2043000 Std 606300 So SS WS 2043000 606300 This looks consistent
